title: Principal Frontend Developer at Qualcomm India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Qualcomm India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Qualcomm India Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Qualcomm India Global Group:
Qualcomm India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India Global Group!
